title: IngestClaudePhaseEvent
description: Phase event emitted by `ingest --mode claude-code` on stdout. Two events: validate (with claude_path, version) and scan (with dir, files_total, files_new, files_existing).

phase.description: Phase name: validate (checks claude-code environment) or scan (discovers files in the target directory).

claude_path.description: Path to the claude-code configuration. Present in validate phase.

version.description: Detected claude-code version. Present in validate phase.

dir.description: Directory path being scanned. Present in scan phase.

files_total.description: Total files matched by the scan. Present in scan phase.

files_new.description: Files not yet ingested. Present in scan phase.

files_existing.description: Files already ingested (will be skipped or updated). Present in scan phase.
